case_title: THOMSON, WILLIAM J. DBA THOMSON BUILDER GROUP VS NATELSON, SANDY MR. PEARCE AND FRANKMAN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THOMSON, WILLIAM J. DBA THOMSON BUILDER GROUP IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NATELSON, SANDY MR. PEARCE AND FRANKMAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
